description: Use this when you need to understand code in its full context. Given a file and line number, returns the surrounding code including function signatures, class definitions, imports, and nearby related code. Essential when you need to see the "bigger picture" around a specific piece of code.

properties.description: Lines before and after target line (default: 20)
properties.name: radius

repository_id.description: Optional repository identifier - uses most recent if not provided

branch.description: Optional branch name - uses default branch if not provided

line.description: Optional line number to center context around

radius.description: Lines before and after target line (default: 20)

summary: Get surrounding code context for a specific location
